home.noDossiersHint: Create your first case to get started.
home.invalidImportMsg: Invalid JSON file: the "dossier.title" field is missing.
home.deleteDossierConfirm: Delete this case and all its content? This action is irreversible.

tabs.noFavoritesHint: Add cases to favorites for quick access.

dossier.dorkChooseType: Choose the type of search to perform:
dossier.reverseImageDrop: Drop or paste an image here
dossier.reverseImageDropHint: Drag-and-drop, Ctrl+V, or click to browse
dossier.reverseImageDirectMode: Public URL detected — direct search available
dossier.reverseImageClipboardMode: Image will be copied to clipboard. Paste it (Ctrl+V) on the engine.
dossier.reverseImageCopied: Image copied to clipboard — paste it on the site (Ctrl+V)
dossier.dorkTipIdentity1: Try different spellings and name variants
dossier.dorkTipIdentity2: Add the city to reduce homonyms
dossier.dorkTipIdentity3: The employer helps target LinkedIn profiles
dossier.dorkTipIdentity4: Date of birth eliminates homonyms and targets official documents
dossier.dorkTipPhone1: Test with and without country code (+32, +33...)
dossier.dorkTipPhone2: Specify android or iphone for specific searches (Google Play, iMessage...)
dossier.dorkTipPhone3: Reverse directories (Infobel, White Pages) can reveal the owner
dossier.dorkTipEmail1: Custom domains often reveal the associated company
dossier.dorkTipEmail2: iCloud/me.com addresses confirm an Apple ecosystem
dossier.dorkTipEmail3: Search in known breach databases (Have I Been Pwned)
dossier.dorkTipUsername1: A unique username is often reused across platforms
dossier.dorkTipUsername2: Check variants: underscores, dashes, added numbers
dossier.dorkTipVehicle1: Test with and without dashes/spaces in the plate
dossier.dorkTipVehicle2: The VIN number allows tracing the vehicle history
dossier.dorkTipFinancial1: Belgian IBANs start with BE, French with FR
dossier.dorkTipFinancial2: Pappers.fr and BCE help find company directors
dossier.dorkTipIP1: Shodan and Censys index open services on an IP
dossier.dorkTipIP2: AbuseIPDB lists abuse reports by IP
dossier.encryptionActive: The sensitive content of this case is end-to-end encrypted. The server cannot read the data.
dossier.encryptionInactive: E2E encryption is not active. Enable it to protect sensitive data.
dossier.keysLocked: Encryption keys locked. Log in again to unlock them.
dossier.encryptionPasswordPrompt: Enter your password to protect your encryption keys:
dossier.encryptionNeedKeys: You must first generate your encryption keys.
dossier.encryptionNeedUnlock: Your encryption keys are locked. Log in again.
dossier.encryptionDisableNeedUnlock: Your encryption keys are locked. Log in again to disable encryption.
dossier.restoreVersionMessage: The current content will be replaced by this version. Create a backup first?
dossier.deleteVersionMessage: This version will be permanently deleted.
dossier.durationWarning: This dossier has been open for {days} days (threshold: {threshold} days for {classification} dossiers)
dossier.durationWarningUrgent: URGENT — This dossier has been open for {days} days (threshold: {threshold} days)
dossier.embargoWarningMessage:
By enabling embargo on this case:

• Only the owner and invited collaborators will have access
• Even administrators will have no visibility
• End-to-end encryption will be automatically enabled
• No activity logs will be recorded

This ensures maximum confidentiality. Are you sure you want to continue?
dossier.embargoDisableMessage:
By disabling embargo, the case will become visible to administrators again and activity logs will be recorded. Encryption will remain active.

Are you sure you want to continue?
dossier.closeDossierDesc: Upload the final report (PDF or DOCX) to close this dossier
dossier.invalidFileType: Invalid format. Only PDF and DOCX files are accepted

tree.permanentDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{title}"? This action is irreversible.
tree.clearTrashConfirmMessage: All items will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible.

profile.backupCodes: Save these recovery codes. They won't be shown again.
profile.reportSignatureDesc: This information will be used to sign generated OSINT reports.

profile.clickOrDrop: Click or drag an image here

encryption.title: Data Security
encryption.details: Only you and authorized members of your dossiers can read them

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.subtitle: Configure your own API keys for commercial AI providers
ai.providerDesc: Choose the AI provider to use for your generations
ai.commercialWarning: Your dossier data will be sent to a commercial service for processing.
ai.privacyItem1: Data is sent encrypted (TLS) to the provider's servers
ai.privacyItem2: The provider may temporarily process data to generate the response
ai.privacyItem3: Data sent via the API is not used to train models
ai.privacyFooter: For highly sensitive data, prefer Ollama which processes everything locally on your server.

telegram.connectionDesc: Connect your Telegram account for direct searches

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.cookieBridgeDesc: Export your social media cookies from your browser to MeteorEdit to enable video downloads and profile analysis.
preferences.step4DevMode: Enable 'Developer mode' in the top right
preferences.step5Load: Click 'Load unpacked' and select the folder
preferences.scanQrHint: Scan this QR code or copy the link below into the extension options
preferences.cookiesFileDesc: Export your cookies in Netscape format via an extension like 'Get cookies.txt LOCALLY', then import the file here.

admin.title: Administration
admin.dossierConfigDesc: Default dossier settings, data retention and duration alerts
admin.tempPasswordHint: Share this password with the user. It won't be shown again.
admin.promptPlaceholder: Enter the prompt for report generation...
admin.backupWarning: Restoration is a destructive and irreversible operation. It replaces all existing data.
admin.deleteUserConfirm: Delete user {name}? This action is irreversible.
admin.appNameDesc: Displayed in the title bar and header
admin.loginMessageDesc: Text displayed below the name on the login page
admin.logoDesc: PNG image displayed in the header and login page
admin.loginBackgroundDesc: Image displayed in the left panel of the login page
admin.faviconDesc: Icon displayed in the browser tab
admin.enableMaintenanceDesc: Blocks site access for all non-admin users
admin.require2FADesc: All users must enable two-factor authentication
admin.lockoutDurationDesc: Wait time after too many failed attempts
admin.allowedEmailDomainsDesc: Restrict registration to specific email domains. Leave empty to allow all.
admin.noDomainsRestriction: No restriction — all domains are accepted
admin.ltEnabledDesc: Enable spell checking for all users
admin.ltDefaultLangDesc: Language used for checking if not auto-detected
admin.apiKeysSubtitle: Manage API access keys for external integrations
admin.keyCopyWarning: This key will never be shown again. Copy it now.
admin.googleApiKeyDesc: Enables Telegram search via Telegago (Google CSE). Enable the 'Custom Search API' in your Google Cloud project. 100 free queries per day.
admin.maxFileSizeDesc: Size limit for each uploaded file
admin.allowedFileTypesDesc: MIME types and extensions separated by commas
admin.totalFilesDesc: Number of files stored on the server
admin.cleanOrphansDesc: Files present on the server but not referenced by any case, note, or setting
admin.scanOrphansDesc: Scan files to detect those no longer in use
admin.cleanOrphansConfirm: {count} orphan file(s) ({size}) will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible.
admin.defaultsSubtitle: Default configuration for cases and retention
admin.e2eDefaultDesc: Automatically enable E2E encryption for new cases
admin.trashPurgeDaysDesc: 0 = disabled. Items in trash will be permanently deleted after this period.
admin.networkSubtitle: CORS, allowed origins and announcement banner
admin.allowedOriginsDesc: List of allowed domains, separated by commas. * = allow all
admin.enableBannerDesc: Display an announcement banner visible to all users
admin.testConfigDesc: Sends a test email to verify settings
admin.clipperTimeoutDesc: Maximum wait time for page capture
admin.clipperUserAgentDesc: Leave empty to use Puppeteer default User-Agent
admin.clipperProxyDesc: Proxy for captures (e.g.: http://proxy:8080). Leave empty for direct connection
admin.aiSubtitle: AI configuration for report generation and enrichment
admin.aiProviderDesc: Choose between a local model (Ollama) or the Claude API (Anthropic)
admin.ollamaProviderDesc: Local model, data stays on your server
admin.claudeGetKey: Get an API key on console.anthropic.com
admin.claudePrivacyText1: When using the Claude API, your case data (titles, descriptions, entities, notes) is transmitted to Anthropic servers for processing.
admin.claudePrivacyItem1: Data is sent encrypted (TLS) to Anthropic servers
admin.claudePrivacyItem2: Anthropic may temporarily process data to generate the response
admin.claudePrivacyItem3: Anthropic commits to not using your data to train its models (API)
admin.claudePrivacyItem4: Data is not retained beyond request processing
admin.claudePrivacyFooter: For highly sensitive data, prefer Ollama which processes everything locally on your server.
admin.claudeTestFailed: Failed to connect to Claude API
admin.openaiProviderDesc: OpenAI cloud API, fast and versatile
admin.openaiGetKey: Get an API key on platform.openai.com
admin.openaiTestFailed: Failed to connect to OpenAI API
admin.openaiPrivacyText1: When using the OpenAI API, your case data (titles, descriptions, entities, notes) is transmitted to OpenAI servers for processing.
admin.openaiPrivacyItem1: Data is sent encrypted (TLS) to OpenAI servers
admin.openaiPrivacyItem2: OpenAI may temporarily process data to generate the response
admin.openaiPrivacyItem3: Data sent via the API is not used to train models
admin.openaiPrivacyFooter: For highly sensitive data, prefer Ollama which processes everything locally on your server.
admin.aiIndividualModeDesc: Allow users to configure their own API keys for commercial providers
admin.aiIndividualModeOn: Users can configure their own API keys
admin.aiIndividualModeHint: When enabled, an AI section appears in each user's profile. Ollama remains available for all.
admin.aiIndividualModeItem1: Each user manages their own API keys and usage costs
admin.aiIndividualModeItem2: Ollama (local) remains available for free for all users
admin.aiIndividualModeItem3: A warning is displayed before each commercial AI usage
admin.aiDisclaimerPlaceholder: Enter the warning message displayed before each commercial AI usage...
admin.aiDisclaimerHint: This message is displayed before each AI generation with a commercial provider. If modified, all users will see it again.
admin.generationPromptDesc: Prompt template sent to AI for report generation
admin.clickToInsert: Click a variable to insert it into the prompt
admin.reportTemplatesDesc: Manage prompt templates for AI report generation
admin.defaultTemplateUsed: The default template (above) will be used
admin.downloadToStart: Download a model to get started
admin.recommendationsDesc: Recommended models for VPS without GPU
admin.telegagoDesc: Telegram search via Google Custom Search Engine
admin.exportBackupDesc: Download a complete copy of the database in JSON format. Includes users, cases, notes and settings.
admin.restoreWarningText: restoration will replace ALL current data. This action is irreversible.
admin.dragOrClickJson: Drag or click to add a .json file
admin.restorationConfirm: This will replace ALL current data with the backup data. This operation is irreversible. Continue?
admin.restoreSuccess: Restoration completed successfully. Reload the page to see changes.
admin.recMistralDesc: Good performance/quality balance. ~4 GB RAM. Excellent in French.
admin.recPhi3Desc: Very lightweight (~2.3 GB RAM). Faster but weaker in French.
admin.recGemma2Desc: Ultra-lightweight (~1.5 GB RAM). For very limited VPS.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.subtitle: Zero-knowledge encryption for investigation files
encryption.allEncrypted: All files are encrypted and unreadable on the server
encryption.allEncryptedDetail: End-to-end encryption is active. No investigation data is readable server-side.
encryption.zeroKnowledgeDesc: The server can never access plaintext data
encryption.autoEncryptNote: New uploads are automatically encrypted. Existing unencrypted content will be encrypted when re-saved.
encryption.migrateFilesDesc: Encrypts all existing unencrypted files and content. Files are downloaded, encrypted client-side, then re-uploaded to the server.
encryption.migrateErrorNoKey: Unable to obtain the dossier encryption key
encryption.keysNotUnlocked: Encryption keys are not unlocked. Please log in again to activate them.

osint.telegramConfigDesc: Connect to the Telegram MTProto API to enrich profiles (HD photos, bio, status, etc.)
osint.telegramHelp: Get your credentials from my.telegram.org > API development tools. The session string is generated during first authentication with your phone number.
